name: EPA+DHA older-adult chronic venous leg ulcer randomized trial registry
summary: A completed randomized triple-masked older-adult chronic venous leg ulcer trial testing EPA+DHA oral therapy with lipid mediator, cytokine, PMN activation, wound-area, recurrence, pain, and quality-of-life endpoints.
population: Adults aged 55 years and older with chronic venous leg ulcers receiving standard care

trial_details.expected_results_window: Completed Dec. 18, 2024; no posted results were present in the Jun. 2, 2026 ClinicalTrials.gov API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: A result could matter for repair and inflammation tracks, but the setting is chronic venous leg ulcers.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Older-adult wound-healing outcomes could make resolution-pathway evidence more concrete if functional or recurrence endpoints are reported.
